headline: Amazon faces internal revolt over data center expansion plans
body: Amazon employees report facing termination threats after opposing the company's data center expansion agenda, according to multiple sources. This internal conflict reflects growing tension between infrastructure scaling demands and workforce concerns about resource allocation. For healthcare AI vendors and implementers, this signals potential disruption in cloud infrastructure availability and pricing, which directly impacts EHR integration costs and the feasibility of deploying AI models in clinical workflows. The underlying dispute over computational resource investment also highlights how vendor stability and internal alignment affect healthcare system purchasing decisions and long-term AI implementation roadmaps.
